nasb.text: But Peter said to him, “May your silver perish with you, because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money!

esv.text: But Peter said to him, “May your silver perish with you, because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money!

cnv.text: 彼得對他說：“你的銀子跟你一同滅亡吧！因為你以為　神的恩賜，是可以用錢買的。

ccb.text: 彼得责备他说：“你和你的钱都一同毁灭吧！因为你以为可以用钱买上帝的恩赐！

csbs.text: 彼得对他说：“你的银子和你一起灭亡吧！因为你以为神的恩赐可以用钱买到！
